transformationMoves: Replace abstract signal-language with ship, dock, wind, ice, and body specifics already present in the scene.
Let Jaina's magical read arrive through tactile cost and deck geometry instead of theory-summary.
Keep dialogue grounded by tying each exchange to working hands, footing, food, rigging, or shore evidence.
Prefer local substitutions and short extensions over explanatory rewrite.

scenes.title: Harbor bargain
scenes.biggestGap: Low revision risk; keep existing harbor and relay texture intact.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Seastone Harbor switchback, quay, eastern signal cairn, and the *Wolfheart* at the outer berth.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Harbor mud, stripped saddles, purse strap, wet dock boards, and the dead stone under Jaina's coat.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina prices the crossing through cold off the water, the horse's warmth, and the purse weight against Dagny's number.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny's bargaining stays attached to horses, tide, berth, and what her deck will bear.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Gangplank, cast-off work, and the cliff path taking the mares back uphill.

scenes.title: Departure into silence
scenes.biggestGap: The post-harbor pull still slips into abstract signal-language instead of staying with bow, horizon, and the ache in Jaina's body.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Harbor mouth, breakwater, and the first long roll outside the cove.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Wet rope in hand, spray on the rail, canvas overhead, stone in her palm, ache behind her teeth.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina's north-read should sharpen only after land-noise and ward-noise fall away and the bow has open dark in front of it.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny's helm call and Jaina's answer must stay attached to visible ship handling.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The coast shrinking from cliff line to nothing while the pressure draws straight over the bow.

dialogueRuns.label: Helm exchange after the harbor falls away

scenes.title: The crossing under opposition
scenes.biggestGap: Resistance and respect beats still risk slipping into theory-language or named realization instead of deck shove, seamanship, and bodily cost.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Working deck, helm lane, lee rail, stern ladder, and shelf-space below deck aboard the *Wolfheart*.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Rope burn, slick planks, sail snap, iced rail, oilskin weight, and the staff under Jaina's hands.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads the opposition through shove at the bow, ache behind the eyes, the bread-taste, and spells that stop leaving cleanly.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny and Sylvanas exchanges must remain pinned to tack timing, footing, food, water, and whether Jaina can still stand.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Recovered distance should still feel bought watch by watch with cold, blood, labor, and reduced reach.

scenes.title: Approach and landfall
scenes.biggestGap: The dawn, approach, and closing beats still risk polished summary where frost, ice-work, dock cuts, and weathered traces should carry the meaning.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Ice-clogged approach channel, bay mouth, sharp-walled harbor, new dockwork, and the burned fleet remains.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cracked lips, frost on shrouds, pole-rings off ice, pale dock cuts, char, and frozen mud under boots.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina experiences arrival as sea-sore exhaustion plus a pull that now splits by shore path, harbor mouth, and inland drag.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dawn talk and landfall lines stay attached to shrouds, soundings, ice-pole work, and shore read.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Dock bump, shaking hands, lungs full of ice and char, and the inland pull catching before the deck-roll leaves her knees.
